name: Xiamen C&D Inc.
summary: Xiamen C&D Inc. engages in the supply chain, real estate development, and industrial investment businesses in China and internationally. Its supply chain operations include the purchase, transportation, and storehouse location and facility allocation, freight tracking, cargo risk management, and inventory management services. The company also supplies pulp and paper, iron and steel, mineral, agricultural, textile and other light industrial, chemical, mechanical and electrical, automobile, and wine/spirit products. Xiamen C&D Inc. was founded in 1980 and is based in Xiamen, China.
